action: Add append-only Merkle checkpoints to the peer-trigger lifecycle ledger.

progress.finding: Ordered receipt histories require a separate append-only commitment; lifecycle validation alone cannot reveal omitted, reordered, mutated, truncated, or forked prior history.
progress.verification: 5 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime using connector-fetched committed logic
progress.limits: Unsigned roots, no witness gossip, full-prefix verification rather than compact consistency proofs, and no proof that event claims are truthful.

handoff: Coordination writers should checkpoint validated ledgers and peers should compare witnessed checkpoints. A future frontier slice should add compact RFC 9162 consistency proofs plus signed or independently witnessed checkpoint exchange.
